reviews.comment:
Ultimo lugar antes de pasar a chile. Posee alojamiento por si hace falta pasar la noche. Gente muy amable y profesional.

(Translated by Google)
Last stop before crossing into Chile. They have accommodation available if you need to spend the night. Very friendly and professional staff.
